What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person with long dark dreadlocks and a white sleeveless top plays a drum with their hands in the foreground. Another individual in white clothing strikes a yellow conga drum featuring a triangular logo in the center. A third person wearing white pants walks away barefoot on a stone paved floor with grass growing in the cracks. Multiple drums including smaller wooden shells are arranged around the musicians.
